```{=html}
<div style="width:90%;margin:0 auto;font-size:0.97em;background-image:radial-gradient(circle,#E0DBE5 0.6px,transparent 0.6px);background-size:18px 18px;padding:1em 1.1em 1.1em;border-radius:18px;">

 <!-- T-bar: now that we have a working site, build a skill from it -->
 <div style="background:#FCEEEC;border:1px solid #F3D4CC;border-radius:12px;padding:0.5em 0.9em;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.7em;box-shadow:0 4px 16px rgba(212,95,71,0.1);text-align:left;">
  <div style="width:1.7em;height:1.7em;border-radius:0.45em;background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid #F0C5BA;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#D45F47;flex-shrink:0;"><i data-lucide="package" style="width:0.9em;height:0.9em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
  <div style="font-size:0.6em;font-weight:700;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.25;">Now that we have a working site, let's build a skill from it, with <span style="color:#D45F47;">Claude</span>'s help</div>
 </div>

 <!-- divider -->
 <div style="height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,#C4C3E8,transparent);margin:0.7em 0 0;"></div>

 <!-- two tasks Claude does -->
 <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:0.7em;margin-top:1.15em;">
  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid #C7C1E5;border-radius:999px;padding:0.34em 0.85em;box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(86,84,162,0.12);">
   <i data-lucide="hammer" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.9;color:#5654A2;flex-shrink:0;"></i>
   <span style="font-size:0.52em;font-weight:700;color:#5654A2;white-space:nowrap;">Build the skill</span>
  </div>
  <i data-lucide="arrow-right" style="width:1.1em;height:1.1em;stroke-width:2.2;color:#9B8EA0;flex-shrink:0;"></i>
  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.45em;background:#FFFFFF;border:1px solid #BCDFC0;border-radius:999px;padding:0.34em 0.85em;box-shadow:0 3px 12px rgba(44,132,117,0.12);">
   <i data-lucide="link" style="width:1em;height:1em;stroke-width:1.9;color:#2C8475;flex-shrink:0;"></i>
   <span style="font-size:0.52em;font-weight:700;color:#2C8475;white-space:nowrap;">Create a symlink</span>
  </div>
 </div>

 <!-- example prompt: one ask, both tasks. Copy to Claude. -->
 <div style="background:#FFFFFF;border:2px solid #3A7DC9;border-radius:14px;padding:0.9em 1.1em;box-shadow:0 6px 22px rgba(58,125,201,0.15);text-align:left;margin-top:1em;">

  <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;gap:0.5em;margin-bottom:0.6em;">
   <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:0.5em;">
    <div style="width:1.8em;height:1.8em;border-radius:0.45em;background:#DCE9FA;border:1px solid #A6C4EA;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;color:#3A7DC9;"><i data-lucide="message-square-quote" style="width:0.9em;height:0.9em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i></div>
    <div style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;font-size:0.5em;color:#3A7DC9;letter-spacing:0.1em;text-transform:uppercase;">Example prompt</div>
   </div>
   <button class="copy-prompt-btn" aria-label="Copy prompt" onclick="var b=this;navigator.clipboard.writeText(document.getElementById('build-skill-prompt-text').innerText.trim()).then(function(){var l=b.querySelector('.copy-label');l.textContent='Copied!';setTimeout(function(){l.textContent='Copy';},1500);});">
    <i data-lucide="copy" style="width:0.85em;height:0.85em;stroke-width:1.8;"></i><span class="copy-label">Copy</span>
   </button>
  </div>

  <div id="build-skill-prompt-text" style="font-size:0.56em;color:#2C3E50;line-height:1.7;font-family:'Georgia',serif;">
   Look at this website folder and turn it into a reusable <span style="color:#5654A2;font-weight:600;">skill</span>: write a <span style="color:#5654A2;font-weight:600;">SKILL.md</span> plus a <span style="color:#5654A2;font-weight:600;">template/</span> folder holding the pages and <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#C4881A;">styles.css</code>. Then <span style="color:#137A6E;font-weight:600;">symlink</span> it into <code style="font-family:'Maple Mono',monospace;color:#137A6E;">~/.claude/skills/</code> so I can reuse it anytime.
  </div>

 </div>

</div>
```
